channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-07 18:23 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon: “Either [humanity is] going to become multiplanetary, or confined to one planet, until some ev...
item.description: Elon: “Either [humanity is] going to become multiplanetary, or confined to one planet, until some eventual extinction event.” So Mars could protect humanity from a single planet disaster.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla battery cell production is getting good
item.description: Tesla battery cell production is getting good

item.title: @elonmusk: Restore Britain will crush parasitic Britain.
item.description: Restore Britain will crush parasitic Britain.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Heavy is insanely good and crazy fast btw. If you are not using it daily, you are messing up.
item.description: Grok Heavy is insanely good and crazy fast btw. If you are not using it daily, you are messing up.

item.title: @elonmusk: 2029 is going to be very simple. You will have 2 choices. If you do not want every single town and c...
item.description: 2029 is going to be very simple. You will have 2 choices. If you do not want every single town and city and every single school in this country to be majority third world immigrants in less than a single generation, then choose Restore Britain. If you do not want Islam to be the dominant religion in this country and the most common name to be Mohammed, then chose Restore Britain. If you do not want your children to be fighting for their very existence as a race, then choose Restore Britain. If you do not want our extinction as a people, choose Restore Britain. If, however, you choose any other party, then they will all lead us to the same destination. The end of Britain. The end of the native peoples of this land. The end of the English, the Welsh, the Scottish and the Northern Irish as the stewards and rightful heirs of our homeland. Because this country is already being given away to those who should not even be here and hold no loyalty to us. It is being surrendered to those who hold only contempt and hatred towards our very existence. Our heritage, our history, our sovereignty, our very identity, handed over without a fight. Or you can say no. We never voted for this. We did not consent. We were never asked. If you want the only party that will do what is needed, to save this country… Then choose Restore Britain.restorebritain.org.uk/join_u…@RestoreBritain_@RupertLowe10

item.title: @elonmusk: Do you want to the truth? This is the truth.. Made by 🅶🆁🅾🅺@grokImagine 💫
item.description: Do you want to the truth? This is the truth.. Made by 🅶🆁🅾🅺@grokImagine 💫

item.title: @elonmusk: Found my new shoulder buddy in this wild dreamscape. Who needs a parrot when you’ve got a tiny cosmi...
item.description: Found my new shoulder buddy in this wild dreamscape. Who needs a parrot when you’ve got a tiny cosmic gremlin with better style than me? 😭✨ Grok Imagine 20s

item.title: @elonmusk: During the first week of March, Tesla sold more cars in Norway than all its competitors combined, ac...
item.description: During the first week of March, Tesla sold more cars in Norway than all its competitors combined, achieving a market share of 53.4%. This was also Tesla's best March ever. 🇳🇴

item.title: @elonmusk: Another 𝕏 peak usage record this week

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
